hotline.phone.label: Call hotline
hotline.email.label: Or email us at
hotline.incidents.title: Active incidents
selfhelp.title: Try this first
selfhelp.item.1.title: Printer not working
selfhelp.item.1.step.1: Check if there is paper in the printer
selfhelp.item.1.step.2: Press the green button to restart
selfhelp.item.1.step.3: If the problem continues, call the hotline
selfhelp.item.2.title: Card not working
selfhelp.item.2.step.1: Make sure the card is activated on your account
selfhelp.item.2.step.2: Try holding the card completely still at the scanner
selfhelp.item.2.step.3: Contact the club if the card still doesn't work
selfhelp.item.3.title: Machine not responding / frozen screen
selfhelp.item.3.step.1: Wait 30 seconds - the machine restarts automatically
selfhelp.item.3.step.2: If the screen is still black after 1 minute, call the hotline
selfhelp.item.4.title: I didn't get my receipt
selfhelp.item.4.step.1: Check if the printer has paper
selfhelp.item.4.step.2: You can always view your purchases in the GolfNext app
selfhelp.item.5.title: Machine is turned off
selfhelp.item.5.step.2: We'll fix it as quickly as possible
club.section.title: What GolfNext cannot help with – contact the club
club.section.description: For the following questions, please contact your golf club directly:
club.item.1: Opening hours and green fee prices
